fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. Always NULL from Fact_CustomerAction, resolved entirely from Dim_Position. NULL if no Dim_Position match. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. Always NULL from Fact_CustomerAction, resolved entirely from Dim_Position. NULL if no Dim_Position match. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
